alpacahack.description: Writeups and deep dives from AlpacaHack Daily challenges.

ctf.description: Capture-the-flag writeups, challenge retrospectives, and technical breakdowns from competitions and practice sets.

crypto.description: Cryptography writeups mostly covering cryptoanalysis, cipher design, and weakness in implementations.

osint.description: Open-source intelligence writeups, specially aviation and geospatial OSINT.

web.description: Web security writeups, mostly focused on protocol analysis.

forensics.description: Digital forensics writeups focused on artifact recovery and metadata analysis.

ecb.description: ECB cipher mode discussions and visualizations.

cipher-mode.description: Block cipher modes of operation (ECB, CBC, etc.).

bitwise-and.description: Bitwise AND operator and statistical attacks.

git.description: Git usage, forensics, and repository analysis.
